title: Practice Ghost Guide Basic UI
goal: Add a minimal ghost guide layer to the practice session page that shows one representative recommendation plus the current legal action list with human-readable wording, while keeping practiceStore persistence boundaries and sim code untouched.
constraints: Do not modify sim store/engine/routes/pages or cross the admin/game import boundary
Keep session lifecycle, engine transitions, and DB writes inside usePracticeStore plus src/lib/practice/queries.ts only
Reuse derived.legalActions as engine ground truth; compute guide ranking and wording in a pure helper, not in Zustand selectors
Guide intensity may exist only as local UI state for this task and must not require DB or store schema changes
If ingredient labels are needed, allow only an additive query/type extension for display names; do not expand into tacit detail/media or practice admin work
No any, as any, ts-ignore, eslint-disable, display:none, or new inline hardcoded style values
No inline filter/map inside Zustand selectors and no extra changes outside the approved write set plus current dirty snapshot baseline
acceptance: /practice/session/:sessionId shows a representative recommendation card and a full legal action list derived from the approved engine state
The action list still executes the existing place/action/pour store actions and session persistence behavior remains unchanged
Guide wording uses practice location labels and stable action copy; place actions use human-readable ingredient names when available and fall back safely otherwise
A Full/Hint/Off intensity control exists at the UI level without changing engine rules, DB writes, or session routing
Recommendation selection is deterministic and covered by pure helper tests
tacit detail/media panels, practice admin authoring, debug console, and sim runtime remain unchanged
npm run build, npx tsc --noEmit, npm run test, and npm run lint complete with no new warnings/errors beyond the pre-existing warning at src/hooks/useGameTick.ts:73
